name: Salem Set of 2 Gray Wicker Adjustable Chaise Lounge with Arms - Orange - Christopher Knight Home
description: Add some stylish comfort to your patio decor with these Christopher Knight Home Salem Set of 2 Wicker Adjustable Chaise Lounges with Cushions. These lounge chairs offer comfort with their adjustable backrests and cushioned tops. These lounges are weather resistant and have folding legs for easy stacking if you want to store them away. Add a comfortable place to lounge in your backyard, patio or pool area with these Christopher Knight Home Salem Set of 2 Wicker Adjustable Chaise Lounges with Cushions.
